debug_info.goal:
ι : Type u_1
Ω : Type u_2
E : Type u_3
inst✝⁷ : LinearOrder ι
inst✝⁶ : OrderBot ι
inst✝⁵ : TopologicalSpace ι
inst✝⁴ : OrderTopology ι
inst✝³ : MeasurableSpace ι
inst✝² : NormedAddCommGroup E
inst✝¹ : NormedSpace ℝ E
inst✝ : CompleteSpace E
mΩ : MeasurableSpace Ω
P : Measure Ω
X : ι → Ω → E
𝓕 : Filtration ι mΩ
hX : IsLocalMartingale X 𝓕 P
hX_cadlag : ∀ (ω : Ω), IsCadlag fun x => X x ω
⊢ ∀ (ω : Ω), IsCadlag fun t => ‖X t ω‖ ^ 2

proof:
fun ω =>
    ⟨fun a => (continuous_norm.pow 2).continuousAt.comp_continuousWithinAt
      ((hX_cadlag ω).right_continuous a),
     fun x => let ⟨l, hl⟩ := (hX_cadlag ω).left_limit x
              ⟨‖l‖ ^ 2, (continuous_norm.pow 2).continuousAt.tendsto.comp hl⟩⟩
successful_attempts:
fun ω =>
    ⟨fun a => (continuous_norm.pow 2).continuousAt.comp_continuousWithinAt
      ((hX_cadlag ω).right_continuous a),
     fun x => let ⟨l, hl⟩ := (hX_cadlag ω).left_limit x
              ⟨‖l‖ ^ 2, (continuous_norm.pow 2).continuousAt.tendsto.comp hl⟩⟩
